title: Contact Rachel - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South and South Bedfordshire - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South & South Bedfordshire
headings: h2: Follow me on social media
text_excerpt: Contact Rachel - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South and South Bedfordshire - Rachel Hopkins MP for Luton South & South Bedfordshire Skip to main content In Luton South and South Bedfordshire Constituency News In Parliament Parliamentary News Parliamentary Contributions Written Questions Newsletter Sign up for my email updates! About Rachel Contact Rachel Office Standards More Menu Contact Rachel Follow me on social media Get in Touch: For assistance, advice or policy queries, you can get in touch via: Email: [email protected] Phone: 01582 457 774 Post: Rachel Hopkins MP, 3 Union Street, Luton, LU1 3AN You can also complete the online form below. Please include your full name, address and contact details in any correspondence. How Can I Help? I can offer assistance with a wide range of issues including immigration, housing allocations and repairs, employment, Universal Credit, child maintenance and other local government issues. Please remember to include your full name, postal address, email and telephone number. When contacting me in respect of a personal casework matter, please also include any relevant reference numbers (such as your Home Office reference number or National Insurance number). Such details will help my staff to deal with your case more efficiently. It is important to note that Members of Parliament are prohibited from giving legal advice. MPs also do not have any powers to interfere or intervene with decisions made by local councils or government departments such as the DWP or the Home Office. For legal representation, please contact the Luton Citizens Advice Bureau who can refer you for legal help. Contact Rachel Your Name * Email Address * Address * Postcode * Contact Telephone Number Please provide an outline of your issue, including any reference numbers Name This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged. Advice Surgeries I offer monthly face-to-face advice surgeries. To book an appointment, please email [email protected] and please remember to include your name, address and telephone number, along with a brief outline of the issue as we might be able to offer immediate help. Urgent Assistance Should you be in need of urgent assistance (especially when our office is closed), the following organisations may be able to help you: Samaritans –call: 116 123, text: 07725 90 90 90 or email [email protected] Childline – counselling and advice for under 19s. 0800 1111 www.childline.org.uk National Domestic Violence Helpline – 0808 2000 247 www.refuge.org.uk Women’s Aid Refuge – Office hours – 01582 391856 https://womensaidinluton.org/ Police – To make a non-urgent crime report phone 101 or report online https://www.beds.police.uk/ Age UK – 0800 678 1602 https://www.ageuk.org.uk/bedfordshire/ StreetLink – 0300 500 0914 https://www.streetlink.org.uk/ Citizens Advice Bureau – 0800 144 8848 https://www.citizensadviceluton.org.uk/ Luton Council – office hours 01582 546000 https://www.luton.gov.uk/ Central Bedfordshire Council – 0300 300 8301 https://www.centralbedfordshire.gov.uk/ Privacy Policy You can read my full privacy policy statement here. Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Francis Steer on behalf of Rachel Hopkins both at 3 Union Street, Luton, LU1 3AN ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
